description: This file defines a Java record JwtProperties that encapsulates configuration properties related to JWT (JSON Web Token) settings, including secret, issuer, and token expiration times. It is used within a Spring Boot application to load configuration from environment variables or application properties.

classes.name: JwtProperties
classes.description: A Java record that holds JWT configuration properties such as secret, issuer, and token expiry durations.

methods.name: <constructor>
methods.description: Auto-generated constructor for JwtProperties record initializing secret, issuer, accessTokenTtlSeconds, and refreshTokenTtlSeconds.
